programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In southern Spain, Jonnie Irwin goes house-hunting in and around the hill-top town of Competa, Andalucia, with Michael and Seamus from Northern Ireland. The duo love cooking and entertaining and are searching for a holiday home where they can invite all their friends. However, while Seamus likes a modern style, Michael has much more traditional tastes, so with a budget of £175,000 and five options up his sleeve, Jonnie tries to come up with the perfect property to suit them both

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Newcastle couple Mick and Dianne find a holiday home in and around Gran Alacant on Spain's Costa Blanca, showing them properties within their budget of £120,000

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: The experts pitch for the jobs of restoring more dilapidated items, featuring a vintage record player and radio set, a poker table, and a wrought iron ceiling lamp

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's Music Week in the pottery, as the remaining potters sculpt a life-like bust of a music legend, kick starting with a surprise special message from an iconic artist. The potters then face a fiddly second challenge to make a mini musical instrument, before judges Rich Miller and Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be named potter of the week and who will be heading home. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. They employ traditional craftsmen to start work on restoring the exterior, but it's not long before the true scale of the damage to the structure is revealed, and as the costs rise, they are forced to take more of the work themselves

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Cullercoats on North Tyneside to catch up with Mark and Suze, who were unable to agree on what to do with their four-bed Victorian town house. When Kirstie and Phil first met the couple nine months earlier, emotional ties to their home had left them in limbo, with Suzie feeling like she was unable to leave, but Mark longed to move into a bigger home with a better layout for their family. Now, Phil returns to find out if they followed through with their decision

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 25-year-old estate agent Hollie-Anna from Margate and 29-year-old Jaison from Norwich, a transsexual man who feels like he has exhausted his local dating pool. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show mash-up, with Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe take on Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade. Nick Helm joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain

programme.title: Back
programme.desc: Stephen is on a health kick, cycling everywhere and making Ellen that he is back to normal. Cass, who is doing a part-tme A-level course, decides to live the full university experience by moving into a shared student house, while Andrew is suspicious of Geoff's new partner and asks Alison to help him investigate. Comedy, starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.title: It's a Sin
programme.desc: While making their way in the world, the terror the friends been avoiding suddenly strikes at their heart in the most unexpected manner. Reeling from the news, everyone has to rally round. And when a hospital takes shocking action, the flatmates must fight like never before. Russell T Davies drama, set in the 1980s during the Aids crisis, starring Olly Alexander, Neil Patrick Harris and Stephen Fry

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A zebra foal is threatened by a leopard that has stolen into the herd's enclosure, while a teenage rhino reluctant to leave his mother is encouraged by rangers to find a mate. A hyena cub who is the runt of his litter is used to coming last when food is divided up between his siblings - until he happens upon a dead antelope

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the East Walls Hotel in Chichester, West Sussex, owned by history-loving husband and wife Celia and Damon Haughey, who have rejected the boutique label

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple launch a luxury B&B in France with a toddler in tow, while a microbrewery in Murcia aims to crack the Spanish lager market

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas is house hunting along the south-east coast of Cyprus with mother and daughter Pat and Tash from Reading, Berkshire. Pat has been longing to buy a holiday home for 20 years, but has always been too busy working and caring for her family to turn the dream into a reality. Now she's retired, she's finally seizing the moment, and is poised to consider the five options Scarlette has found for her within her £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Colin and Alison Jenkins search for a home in Barbados with a budget of £275,000 budget on the island's lively south coast

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: in Cardiff, DJ Trishna hopes her cooking will be even better than her rapping, as she hosts a hip-hop themed night in a bid to scoop the £1000 prize. However, when Yuno shakes his booty on the dance floor, opera-loving Nick is unimpressed and flirty Michelle lets her hands do the talking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the second day of the competition in Cardiff and Nick is planning to bring some refinement and fine dining to the week's proceedings. However, fastidious Nick really has set himself a mountain to climb with a massive tasting menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third day in Cardiff, retail manager Yuno hopes to scoop the prize by whisking his guests off to the Himalayas. As well as entertaining his guests with some traditional dancing, Yuno's also hoping to tickle their taste buds by serving up Nepalese food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's day four of the competition in Cardiff and turn of self-appointed 'hostess with the mostest' Michelle. She's out to impress with a culinary trip around the world, but when she sets a fun challenge, she ends up being accused of cheating

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Cardiff, host Suzanne is pinning her hopes on an evening of sophistication and fine French cuisine. Suzanne's menu is inspired by her many holidays to France - in fact she's been every year for the last 17 years. However, revealing the inspiration behind her starter might be a step too far for her guests, especially after the revelations found inside her 'special' cupboard!

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz helps Frasier arrange a date between her mother and Martin, unaware they detest each other. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Woody pays Frasier a surprise visit and the friends become nostalgic about old times in a certain Boston bar. With a guest appearance by Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Sarah and Adam from Sussex search for a holiday home in the coastal town of Mojacar, Spain, with a budget of £85,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman goes house hunting on Spain's Costa Blanca with Barnsley couple Paul and Lisa, who cannot wait to buy their first property together in the ever-popular resort of Torrevieja. They have three children and seven grandchildren wanting to visit, so the pressure is on Jasmine to find a holiday home the whole family can enjoy. With a £72,000 budget, she shows them five options - but will any measure up to their expectations?

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: A health practitioner from Shropshire brings in a reclining armchair, and restaurant owners bring in a Georgian cabinet which has doubled up as a toilet roll holder

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George looks back at arguably his most ambitious project, when he and Will Hardie built a 360-degree, gravity-defying, rotating home inspired by vintage sci-fi comics. In search of inspiration for this seemingly impossible challenge, George goes to Holland, Germany and the local fairground

programme.title: Instant Family (2018)
programme.desc: After being taunted by relatives who think they will never have kids, married couple Pete and Ellie Wagner consider the option of adopting a child. However, they get more than they bargained for when they take in a rebellious teen and her two siblings. Director Sean Anders' comedy, starring Mark Wahlberg, Rose Byrne and Isabela Merced

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 25-year-old estate agent Hollie-Anna from Margate and 29-year-old Jaison from Norwich, a transsexual man who feels like he has exhausted his local dating pool. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The wife, mother and daughters of a man who has been hit by a car wait for news from the doctors of whether he has suffered internal injuries, including a bleed on the brain. Other patients include a man who has cut off four of his toes mowing the lawn, and a three-year-old boy who has suffered a seizure

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe are among the famous faces hitting the couch, joining Britain's favourite opinionated viewers as part of this year's Stand Up to Cancer appeal. Also taking part are Line of Duty's Adrian Dunbar, Vicky McClure and Martin Compston, KSI and Craig David, David Mitchell and Victoria Coren Mitchell, and Roger Daltrey and John Bishop. Shows they are appraising include Simply Nigella, Five Guys a Week, The Andrew Marr Show interview with Michael Gove, Family Fortunes, Scream, The Million Pound Cube, Emily's Story: Stand Up to Cancer, and news coverage of Manchester mayor Andy Burnham's skirmish with the Government

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer guide prospective buyers in Hampshire through the complex world of viewings and agents as they try to buy a home. Kirstie meets Clive and Debbie, a couple who are looking to find a home with enough bedrooms for their extended family and a garden big enough for their outdoor-loving children to enjoy. Meanwhile, Phil meets chemical engineers TJ and Chee, who moved from Malaysia to the UK to ignite their careers

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Cullercoats on North Tyneside to catch up with Mark and Suze, who were unable to agree on what to do with their four-bed Victorian town house. When Kirstie and Phil first met the couple nine months earlier, emotional ties to their home had left them in limbo, with Suzie feeling like she was unable to leave, but Mark longed to move into a bigger home with a better layout for their family. Now, Phil returns to find out if they followed through with their decision

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Wheatsheaf in Sandbach, Cheshire, where owner Jake Pare and general manager Chris Baldwin hope to impress their guests

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: B&B owners in France juggle a busy diary with the pressures of parenthood. In Spain, a microbrewery ramps up promotion, and a couple in France create face cream from snail slime

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In southern Spain, Jonnie Irwin goes house-hunting in and around the hill-top town of Competa, Andalucia, with Michael and Seamus from Northern Ireland. The duo love cooking and entertaining and are searching for a holiday home where they can invite all their friends. However, while Seamus likes a modern style, Michael has much more traditional tastes, so with a budget of £175,000 and five options up his sleeve, Jonnie tries to come up with the perfect property to suit them both

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Su and Reg Roberts from south Wales first fell in love with Tobago 20 years ago and have been back every other year since. Now, with their children growing up and retirement approaching, they're ready to turn their dream of a holiday home on the island into a reality. Presenter Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties within their £310,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first dinner date in Middlesbrough glamorous 41-year-old sales assistant Gail hosts a night full of sparkly gourmet grub and teaches her guests a lesson or two in beauty. Her guests are 52-year-old vintage shop owner Jane, 28-year-old football coach Dan, 57-year-old art enthusiast Julie and 47-year-old pub landlord Gary. Gail gets the glitter, sparklers and hair extensions out, but whether her food will get glowing reviews ramins to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Goalkeeping coach Dan hopes to thrill his guests with a James Bond evening in Middlesbrough, including 007-inspired food and a Bond villain. however, Julie and Jane fail to 'bond' on the night, falling out over everything from who's been the best James Bond, to how to pronounce Roger Moore. Gary and Gail also fall out when the table chat turns to 'lookey-likeys'. After dinner, Dan challenges his guests to put one past him in a penalty shoot-out, which ends with a surprising result

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Middlesbrough, pub landlord Gary plans a 1980s evening, serving classic dishes with a modern twist. However, Jane and Julie are still bickering and Gary falls out with Gail over his dessert. Showman Gary flambés his steaks at the table, and tops things off with a magic display that goes down well with all of his guests - except one

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vintage shop owner Jane serves up a retro menu and a vintage clothes competition in Middlesbrough. Jane's been on the attack at the table so far, but she's planning to be the perfect host this time. On a lively night, there's more drama between the diners, and Julie and Gail discover that Jane has created headlines in the local news

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Middlesbrough, Julie's Indian menu gets mixed reviews, while Gail and Jane make a shoe discovery that leads to some shocking dinner table revelations. Gary finds out how much he's got on Jane's nerves throughout the week, as the contestants candidly reveal what they think of each other

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An episode consisting of three Valentine's Day stories. Frasier takes his station manager to dinner, but cannot work out whether she has a personal or professional interest in him. Niles' plans for a romantic evening are dashed, while Martin and Daphne commiserate with each other in their loneliness. Guest starring Virginia Madsen (Sideways)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires a new lawyer to represent him in his divorce case when Maris tries to postpone the settlement. However, the attorney warns him that his unrequited passion for Daphne could harm his chances in court - and so could Frasier's inability to lie

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Mariam and Nasser, from the West Midlands, find a family holiday home they can eventually retire to in the countryside of Murcia, south-east Spain. The couple used to live near Madrid and desperately miss the Spanish sunshine and way of life, especially the outdoor cooking. Laura has five sizzling hot properties to show them for their £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lisa and daughter Jordan are searching for their dream holiday home around the beautiful inland villages of Andalucía. They particularly love the town of Velez-Malaga, so Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties in the area for their budget of £75,000. They have set their sights on a traditional Spanish property with a modern twist, so will Jonnie be able to deliver?

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Antiques dealer Mantas brings in a vintage horse-drawn sleigh from Lithuania, and later, nurse Loretta looks for a woodworker to breathe new life into her vintage trunk

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Presenters Ant and Dec join Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty in their cafe on Southend Pier. The Saturday Night Takeaway hosts love sushi, so Jamie and Jimmy help get them ready to rumble with a beginner's guide to Japanese cooking. Away from the bistro, Jamie rustles up a mouth-watering Italian-style steak and chips, while Jimmy demonstrates a simple crispy chicken that looks impressive without taking hours. Out on the road, Jamie and Jimmy train as baristas at a coffee company that helps homeless people get back on their feet

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's Music Week in the pottery, as the remaining potters sculpt a life-like bust of a music legend, kick starting with a surprise special message from an iconic artist. The potters then face a fiddly second challenge to make a mini musical instrument, before judges Rich Miller and Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be named potter of the week and who will be heading home. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Two singletons in the wedding industry hope to find love for themselves on Valentine's Day, and a 71-year-old retired politician looks for someone to go travelling with. A West End actor may get over his romantic stage fright with the help of a musical theatre fan, while a delivery driver may finally have found a woman who is not driven off by his jokes

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. From a lighthouse cottage on a private island near the Isle of Skye and a stunning tree house in the Wye Valley, to the only nature reserve in England in which you can stay, every episode visits a different region and promises hidden away places offering glorious sanctuary. In the opening edition, Sandi is joined by legendary actor Alison Steadman to seek out extraordinary escapes in the wilds of Suffolk

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the small fishing village of Polperro in southern Cornwall, harbourmaster Olly Puckey prepares for the arrival of a new storm gate, designed to protect residents, houses and fishing boats from the winter sea surges. In Devon, dairy farmer Jon Perkin hopes visitors at Widdecombe Fair are willing to try his alternative ice-cream and yoghurt, while stonemason Alex Piper and glazier Arthur Bradley must draw on all their skills and experience to save the crumbling vestry window of a church in the Cornish village of Warbstow

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Brixworth in Northamptonshire to catch up with Sarah and Ian who appeared on the show back in 2015. Back then, they had just one toddler and two dogs and their two-bed semi was bursting at the seams. Ian wanted to move on, but Sarah was determined to stay, convinced their home had the potential to cater for a growing family. Now, Phil returns to find out what happened next

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick tries to save a tortoiseshell cat's leg by cutting out a tumour that has developed and replacing its knee with a unique bionic implant. Staffordshire bull terrier Rosie is admitted as an emergency after her back legs suddenly collapse in the park, and Noel performs essential spinal surgery to the diseased discs in Rosie's spine and advises a course of intense physiotherapy

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador puppy with an elbow disease, and believes a possible solution might involve fitted plates and stem cell injections. Elsewhere, a one-year-old cat is brought in suffering from a crushed pelvis and a broken tail after a road traffic accident, and a Russian Black Terrier with a cancerous growth is at risk of losing his leg

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Wheatsheaf in Sandbach, Cheshire, where owner Jake Pare and general manager Chris Baldwin hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Devon, 19, leaves her parents' eight-bedroom, 12-bathroom mansion in Exeter to live with the Gibbins family of Lincoln, who struggle to make ends meet

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Nadia, the daughter of a self-made Jordanian businessman samples life with teenage mum-of-two Natalie, who has had to scrub other people's toilets just to get by

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A group of residents in Guildford object when the occupant of a one-bedroom council flat decides to transform his home into a 'cannabis cafe'. Having turned a blind eye to their unruly neighbour's all-night parties and unwelcome lodgers, this latest development proves to be a step too far. In a small community in Wales, new arrivals cause a stir when they decide to convert a local pub into their new home, and in Lincolnshire, a young father becomes the victim of a violent assault after asking the man living in the flat below his to keep the noise down

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A family who have generated more than 600 complaints from angry neighbours move into a quiet suburban street in Blackburn. Plus, a psychiatrist in south London battles a huge renovation next door, while thumping basslines, pounding walls and slamming doors deprive a mother and her family of sleep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve discover a locked wooden case when they are called to evict tenants from a flat in London's Docklands. Opening it up, they realise they urgently need police back-up - and the property quickly becomes a crime scene. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila and Des stage a fake date to uncover Clive's real feelings, but their plan backfires. Hendrix steals a gun out of fear, and ends up hiding it in the Kennedy pizza oven

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari and Tane need to act quickly on Paul's ultimatum, and end up telling Nikau the truth. Bella discovers how lonely she is, and John gets stood up by his date

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Reality show in which two families from opposite ends of the wealth and class divide swap homes, budgets and social status for seven days to discover how the other half lives. The Fiddes family from Royal Wootton Bassett rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a six-bedroom home paid for by husband Matt's chain of martial arts centres. For the four-strong Leamon family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their four-bedroom terrace on a Southampton council estate, and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,500 instead of their usual £170

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions. He meets Allana, whose two Labradors Teddy and Fudge pull her along at break-neck speed when out walking. He then visits Peggy, a cross-breed with a penchant for escaping, no matter how much her owners try to keep her penned in. Finally, Graeme heads to Blackpool, where Stanley the terrier has been struggling ever since his best friend Sweep died

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow bulk buyer Zana, who shops for the biggest offers, and Allan, who has invested in a yacht to live a champagne lifestyle on a lemonade budget

programme.title: Celebs on the Farm
programme.desc: The celebs arrive on the farm in style before adopting calves, mucking out a calf creche and discovering a caravan park from hell. Farmer Chris gets very angry

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Two-part series following students working within the sex industry, as they attempt to pay off their student debt by stripping, escorting and filming pornography. In the first episode, paramedic science student Jasmine opens up about her experience in the adult industry, which she fears may get her thrown off her university course. Elsewhere, PHD student Luke looks back at the time he appeared in an adult movie as an undergraduate student

programme.desc: Critical Care Paramedic Fay is despatched to the scene of a serious motorbike crash, and Ambulance control receive an emergency call reporting a man collapsed in a churchyard

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Medical staff are faced with an aggressive patient who was brought in by police after being pushed down a flight of concrete stairs, and is shouting and swearing. Doctor Andrew administers morphine to help a woman in agony, but the medics grow worried when her screams turn to silence

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Alex, who drives a £40,000 Mercedes-Benz car, goes to stay with Jen, Antony and baby Jaxon, who survive on £1,000 a month in Bolton

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A family who have generated more than 600 complaints from angry neighbours move into a quiet suburban street in Blackburn. Plus, a psychiatrist in south London battles a huge renovation next door, while thumping basslines, pounding walls and slamming doors deprive a mother and her family of sleep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary about disputes between neighbours continues with single mum Amy, whose new life in Dorset turned sour when neighbour Rebecca betrayed her

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian O'Shaughnessy and Graham Aldred's first case sees them in a Brighton health spa as they search for assets to seize in pursuit of a £20,000 debt. Following a stand-off, they devise a way to work with the owner and her professional advisers to come up with a solution. Later, Graham reveals his softer side when he revisits a woman who defaulted on a debt payment plan

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Dipi goes into wife mode to care for Shane after a horrific incident, while Hendrix comes clean and enlists the help of Chloe as he decides to contact the police

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Taylor misses Colby and decides to pay him a visit after Angelo tells her to sort out any loose ends. Tori stubbornly refuses to accept fault, while Jasmine wants to move on

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: From endless food and drink to hotels with kids' clubs and water parks, going all-inclusive is supposed to be all about hassle-free fun in the sun. But for some, this option proves anything but relaxing. Here cameras follow the unlucky holidaymakers whose breaks went horribly wrong. They include nurse Julia Vaughan, who spent more than £5,500 on a relaxing break in Crete for herself and her family, only to be confronted by a giant construction site next to their hotel

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary looking at how the German supermarket has succeeded in the UK, overcoming industry hostility and old-fashioned snobbery to win the public over with its discounted goods. Former staff reveal how Aldi has overcome shoppers' suspicions using a host of clever techniques to cut costs, from multiple barcodes and less time spent at the tills, to their own-brand products - which are intended to look and taste like their big-name counterparts, but cost a fraction of the price

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Examining the murder of retired schoolteacher Alethea Taylor. She went missing in 2012 and her body has never been found. Alethea's friends and family are among the contributors

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1980, serial killer Peter Sutcliffe - known in the press as the Yorkshire Ripper - murdered 13 women and attacked at least seven more in the north of England. In this programme, psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Sutcliffe and look at events in his childhood and adult life that may have triggered his descent into murder, and also examine how he managed to avoid suspicion despite being interviewed by police numerous times

programme.title: Flatliners (2017)
programme.desc: Five medical students embark on a daring experiment. By stopping their hearts for short periods, each triggers a near-death experience, giving them a first hand account of the afterlife. Sci-fi drama based on the 1990 thriller, starring Elliot Page, Diego Luna and Nina Dobrev

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Flatliners (2017)
programme.desc: Five medical students embark on a daring experiment. By stopping their hearts for short periods, each triggers a near-death experience, giving them a first hand account of the afterlife. Sci-fi drama based on the 1990 thriller, starring Elliot Page, Diego Luna and Nina Dobrev

programme.title: Rogue Earth: When Mother Nature Takes Revenge
programme.desc: Using video captured on smartphones and other devices, this programme recounts the Super Outbreak of 2011, when 362 tornadoes ripped across 21 American states. The story is told by heroes, survivors and victims in Alabama, where 252 fatalities and millions of dollars in property damage occurred

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: As the pipes, tunnels and waterways that lie beneath the world's cities start to crumble, sinkholes are appearing with no warning. Footage from instances around the world reveal how once-stable urban areas are sinking right in front of people's eyes

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

After moving into a his new home, ex-paratrooper Tim finds himself dragged into an unexpected battle with his new neighbours

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring a single mum and her daughter who faced problems when they moved into a new flat in Milton Keynes because of a resident in the same block. Plus, the case of a Manchester man and his son whose life in a new flat turned into a nightmare when they were viciously turned upon in the form of a racist attack by one of their neighbours

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: With Yashvi tracking Kane, everyone is worried sick for Harlow. Nicolette faces Kane's wrath, as well as disappointment from both Aaron and David

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella begs Colby to appeal his sentence, Taylor makes an attempt to move on with her marriage, and when Martha returns she confesses to Alf

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: One inventive dad thinks he has a solution to reduce the amount of accidents outside of schools, but will his pop-up zebra crossing make the streets around his children's school a safer place? Elsewhere in the programme, cameras join the bus drivers of Bath, whose routes are peppered with evidence of careless parking

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Following his life-or-death missions in The Da Vinci Code, and Angels and Demons, long suffering expert Robert Langdon awakes with amnesia in an Italian hospital, and is soon on the run with a beautiful doctor. Racing to stop a devastating virus, the symbologist suffers shocking visions as an assassin closes in. Director Ron Howard's conversion of the Dan Brown thriller, starring Tom Hanks, Felicity Jones and Irrfan Khan

Psychological thriller, with Bridget Fonda, Jennifer Jason Leigh, and Steven Weber

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits London, where she is introduced to an MP, a meeting that proves to be the kiss of death for the unfortunate fellow. However, the mystery surrounding his murder deepens as the corpse goes missing only to reappear with a new identity. Whodunit, guest starring Trevor Eve and Sharon Maughan

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a model and discover splashes of blood that obviously did not come from the victim, but suggest the culprit is a relative. With Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A crime-scene investigator is killed in her apartment, and evidence initially leads Lupo and Bernard to her fiance - until a journalist is attacked by a taxi driver, and DNA evidence opens up an entirely new line of inquiry. Drama, starring Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate after an aspiring musician is found dead behind a bin, and a bag of money left nearby leads them to a number of suspects. One of them confesses to the shooting, but says he only did it because he thought his daughter had been abducted. Further investigation by the detectives reveals that there may be a link between their case and a possible terrorist threat. Guest starring Michael Kenneth Williams (The Wire, Boardwalk Empire)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to trap a crooked lawyer who bribes his clients - but as he tries to track down the man's accomplice, he realises the investigation has placed his own job on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An answering machine message leads Briscoe and Curtis to reopen an investigation into an arson attack that killed a girl - but the 15-year-old suspect has a powerful ally in his grandfather, an influential force in political spheres. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Robert Vaughn (Hustle) alongside Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two teens from an underachieving high school are accused of burning to death a student from a more successful charter school. Lupo and Bernard investigate, and soon begin to suspect the boys' principal is providing them with a bogus alibi. Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a woman is found brutally murdered, and the evidence leads them to a medical school student. Police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A suspect dies while being restrained by Ziva, who finds herself accused of using undue force and becomes the subject of an internal investigation. To make matters worse, Jenny is kidnapped by the dead man's brother, who demands a consignment of impounded heroin in exchange for her release. Drama, guest starring Connor Trinneer (Enterprise) and Tamara Taylor (Bones), with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gibbs is injured in an explosion while conducting inquiries aboard a ship. He lapses into a coma, during which he has flashbacks of the past he has always kept hidden. Meanwhile, Tony takes over the investigation, but his approach begins to cause friction

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs emerges from his coma, but is suffering from amnesia - hindering the team's attempts to unravel a terrorist plot, as he is the only person likely to possess information on the would-be perpetrator's plans. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: One of the NCIS agents is starstruck after the team investigates an explosion outside the home of Navy Petty Officer First Class Todd Nicholas and his wife, popular reality TV performer Sheba Nicholas. Elsewhere, Vance continues physical therapy for the injuries sustained when he was held hostage. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Tara Holt star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A sports reporter seeks Benson's help to accuse a cameraman of rape, but only agrees to press charges after she discovers the man is stalking her. Before the trial begins the team finds out she is pregnant, and ADA Barba must contend with questionable defence tactics as a result

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU detectives investigate after a school nurse notices multiple injuries on a young girl. It soon becomes clear that they must stop a clinically psychopathic boy with homicidal tendencies. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Dustin and Lauren are captured by a drug dealer in the forest, who is subsequently murdered in a mysterious fashion. A length of hair is found at the scene of the crime, which connects the killing to a girl who went missing nine years earlier. However, while Nick visits Monroe to discuss the case, the frustrated brothers of the deceased man kidnap Dustin in a bid to determine who killed their brother

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A string of brutal murders leads Hank and Nick to an escaped convict who is seeking revenge on those who put him behind bars

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The son of a Russian diplomat is murdered and during the investigation Castle entertains a jovial security guard who turns out to be more involved in the case than expected

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis discover a man leading a secret double life when they investigate who opened fire on a group of people disembarking from a party cruise. A major dispute erupts when Schiff confronts the governor and attorney general over the decision to seek the death penalty. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pizza delivery man is murdered, causing trouble when the two suspects point the finger at the other. Though one of the pair is taped admitting to the crime, his Catholic priest uncle forbids the team from violating the sanctity of the Confessional. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard struggle to establish a motive when a woman who adopted 10 children with learning difficulties is murdered. The duo question her husband, who discovered the body, before turning their attention to the youngsters - until information about an affair and the offer of a reality TV appearance sheds light on the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of fashion company owner Sid Maxwell, and question their initial conclusion of asphyxia when they meet photographer Terry Clark. The duo discover a suspicious website after learning Maxwell was using a fake identity

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a Middle Eastern man sends Briscoe and Curtis racing to thwart a suspected terrorist plot to bring destruction to New York - and leads them to uncover a domestic conspiracy involving horrific female circumcision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy faces bad memories when a drunk driver kills three people - and finds himself forced to protect the perpetrator in the process. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cutter is forced to face the unexpected consequences of his actions when his guilty verdict in a murder trial is set aside. Anna Chlumsky guest stars, with Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of four policemen and discover a connection between drug dealers, a jealous husband and a remorseful judge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and the team try to prove Ziva had nothing to do with a political assassination carried out by her former Mossad partner - but have to tackle the case without Gibbs, who has retired to Mexico and now spends his time building boats. Naval crime drama, starring Cote de Pablo and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Against his better judgement, Gibbs comes out of retirement to help Fornell and his daughter, whose lives are being threatened by an escaped convict. The team reopens the criminal's case and questions a former sailor, the only person to have contacted him while he was in jail. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette, with Hal Holbrook

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A missing US Navy lieutenant's car is found covered in blood, and the team discovers she had been profiling men to find the perfect partner. When further investigations reveal she had planned to attend a seminar at a local hotel, Ziva goes undercover in a bid to find out more. Meanwhile, Jenny makes Tony a secret offer

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and his new temporary partner Bishop are assigned to investigate the death of a reporter whose lover is the prime suspect in her murder. They discover the victim may have been involved with her editor - and could also have been helping plagiarise and invent stories for the paper. Vincent D'Onofrio and Samantha Buck star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Barba's loyalties are tested when two of his childhood friends, New York mayoral candidate Alex Munez and his bodyguard Eddie, are involved in a high-profile sex scandal

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A student accuses the star of a reality singing competition of molesting her. Rollins believes the man's case should be handled delicately to avoid damaging his career, but Benson disagrees. As more victims come forward, the suspect is adamant he did not commit the crimes, so the team must devise a new strategy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A local college student is sexually assaulted, and the SVU detectives utilise every strategy they have to uncover a massive conspiracy involving the university's leading administrators. Rollins and Benson visit the victim at a psychiatric hospital, where she is undergoing electroshock therapy to erase the memories of her attack

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a high-school teen is gang-raped at a rock concert, Amaro finds himself trying to save the reputation of the prime suspect, an army veteran with Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder and a fragmented memory of exactly what happened on the night concerned. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars alongside Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a murder and discover two people with a connection to the victim are magical creatures - one a timid humanoid mouse, the other a ruthless snake monster

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick investigates a plot involving vulture-like monsters and harvesting organs from homeless teenagers, while considering telling Juliette the truth about himself

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author and Beckett are abducted and forced to solve twisted puzzles with strangers, while Alexis and the rest of the team race to save them

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Investigations into a stolen credit card lead Briscoe and Curtis to a pair of teenage lovers who may have killed their newborn son and disposed of the body. The couple strenuously deny any wrongdoing - but the discovery of a decomposing baby's finger adds weight to the evidence against them. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to prosecute a pilot accused of murdering her married lover for trying to end their relationship, but finds himself battling the Navy and the office of the Judge Advocate General, who seem intent on obstructing his efforts. Acclaimed American detective drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy woman is found dead in her apartment, but Lupo and Bernard are quick to dismiss the theory that the killer sought her money. Evidence suggests she was mixing with dangerous figures, among them a cartel, after suitcases filled with cash and drugs are found in the victim's portfolio of properties

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A traffic collision that resulted in multiple fatalities is seemingly caused by a drink driver, but that theory is dismissed as Lupo and Bernard's investigation gets under way. The detectives discover a nasal spray that has been spiked to disorient its user and learn a pharmaceutical company worker was intending to disclose sensitive details about her employer - so the duo try to track down her boss

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross investigate when a restaurant becomes the scene of a shooting, and discover one of the diners is concealing a desire for revenge. Unfortunately, the object of their suspicion has a clever defence already up her sleeve - and only an expert witness can break her story. Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A charity worker with a secret appetite for sordid encounters dies at the hands of a serial killer, but the defendant constructs a unique case by claiming the crime was the result of exposure to excessive violence on television. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of an environmental scientist who was poisoned at a global-warming convention. The case bringing up a number of suspects, including professional rivals and his wife's former husband, and for Cutter it stirs up unpleasant memories from his own past

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of an heiress from an apparent drug overdose. However, the duo soon realise there is more to the case than meets the eye, as they uncover a conspiracy to kill off wealthy cancer patients so inheritors do not have to pay an estate tax

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The shooting of a petty officer looks like an open-and-shut case when a Russian man is found with a recently fired gun in his car. However, the investigation takes a dramatic turn when it is revealed he is working as a spy for the Department of Homeland Security. Military crime drama, with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a lance corporal, whose body has been found in an empty house, and discovers he had a number of spurned lovers and a $2million inheritance. Ducky and Gibbs interview one of the dead marine's partners, but disagree over whether she is telling the truth. David McCallum and Mark Harmon star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Kidnappers strike on Halloween, wounding a marine sergeant and snatching his daughter - leaving the team members wondering why anyone would try to extort money from someone on such a modest salary. As the agents begin searching for a motive, Abby surprises everyone by turning up at the lab in a revealing fancy-dress costume

programme.title: The Murders
programme.desc: Kate and Nolan look into the death of a bodyguard whose most recent client, a young rapper, is unwilling to cooperate with the investigation

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Junior officer Amelia Albers is arrested for a drink-driving, but her ripped clothes and other injuries cause the police concern and they call in Benson for advice. A group of soldiers from her unit is suspected of her rape, but the young woman does not want to cooperate with the SVU out of fear that it may ruin her military career

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins helps her friend press charges against her lover, whom she accuses of rape. However, when the case escalates to a charge of murder, Rollins finds herself forced to reveal details of her own private life on the stand. Hard-hitting drama, starring Kelli Giddish, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two surprise sniper attacks on the NYPD leave the SVU squad scrambling for answers. When the link between the shootings appears to be Detective Tutuola, he reconnects with his former Narcotics partner to uncover a possible motive tied to their old cases. As the violence continues, Lieutenant Eames joins the investigation and the unit races to hunt down a killer no one saw coming

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A comatose woman is found clinging to life in a rowboat after an assault on the East River near the mayor's home. The victim's condition leads to a complex investigation reconstructing her recent activities, and the detectives' findings uncover some surprising results. Richard Thomas (The Waltons) guest stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank hunt for a woman who is actually a spider creature that devours the internal organs of men to survive. On investigation, it becomes clear there is an entire family of lethal arachnids to deal with. Fantasy drama, starring David Giuntoli

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate the murder of an elderly couple - an inquiry that leads them to an underground circuit where grimm creatures are forced to fight to the death. When Monroe lends a hand and gets out of his depth, Nick has to dig deep to defend him

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Sail the Saronic and Ionian Greek islands with Peter Maneas as he explores their rich history, culture, cuisine, and people as well as their hidden secrets and surprises

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: The Harassed Hero (1954)
programme.desc: A hypochondriac is ordered by his doctor to avoid stressful situations. Unfortunately, he inadvertently becomes involved in an explosive international criminal caper. Comedy, starring Guy Middleton and Joan Winmill Brown

programme.title: Moby Dick (1956)
programme.desc: Obsessive skipper Captain Ahab leads his ship and crew on an epic quest to find and kill the legendary white whale that bit off his leg - but his lust for vengeance endangers all their lives. John Huston's seafaring adventure, based on Herman Melville's novel, starring Gregory Peck, Richard Baseheart, Orson Welles and Leo Genn

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s takes a look at the origins of jazz and challenges the theories that it is a black music form which was created in New Orleans. Featuring contributions and footage from Miles Davis, Duke Ellington, Charlie Mingus and Louis Armstrong

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Sail the Saronic and Ionian Greek islands with Peter Maneas as he explores their rich history, culture, cuisine, and people as well as their hidden secrets and surprises

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens, which house a diverse collection of plants and are a leading centre for scientific research and conservation

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot offers his body and Gary fixes up a burglar alarm in forlorn efforts to impress Deborah

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Paul and his family head for court to face the accusers and await the verdict. Paul has his own ideas about how to proceed, and in defiance of Jerome's recommendations, is determined to take the witness stand himself and give his side of the story. However, it seems that Karl may hold the key to determining the outcome of the trial. Dee starts to suspect that Marie's faith in her husband's innocence may be wavering and that even if he is innocent, their marriage may not survive. Robbie Coltrane and Julie Walters star in the final episode of the drama

programme.title: The Best of IBA Fight Night
programme.desc: Alan Mortlock brings you the best bouts from his IBA unlicensed boxing events from events across London and Essex. See prize fighting in its raw form as contenders go toe-to-toe in the ring

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: Val and Elsie
programme.desc: Short film about a pensioner and her reckless carer

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s tells the story of ragtime music. Featuring rare early footage of Irving Berlin and a look at the life of Scott Joplin

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: Mystery on Bird Island (1954)
programme.desc: Five youngsters living in the Channel Islands discover a plot to smuggle valuable birds' eggs out of the country. Children's adventure, starring Mavis Sage and Jennifer Beach

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike and Laura agree to go on a date, but chaos ensues in the restaurant when Laura loses a contact lens. Starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: A storm stops the migration, but how do you lead a group of panicking geese through a hurricane?

programme.title: Nils Holgersson

programme.title: A Chorus of Disapproval (1988)
programme.desc: A shy widower gets entangled in romantic intrigue while rehearsing with an amateur theatrical troupe in Scarborough. Comedy based on Alan Ayckbourn's stage play, starring Jeremy Irons, Anthony Hopkins, Prunella Scales, Lionel Jeffries, Jenny Seagrove, Gareth Hunt and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Saturday Night Out (1963)
programme.desc: Five sailors spend their overnight leave in London, where they get involved with a variety of unusual characters. Drama, starring Bernard Lee, Heather Sears and John Bonney

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens, which house a diverse collection of plants and are a leading centre for scientific research and conservation

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring the origins of the blues, with contributions and performance recordings by Memphis Slim, Ray Charles, Muddy Waters, Billie Holiday and BB King

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Sitcom written by My Family creator Fred Barron, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst of only Only Fools and Horses fame as divorcee Jimmy Venables, whose ex-wife leaves to work as a nurse in Africa. He soon finds his efforts to raise his children - Molly, a girl who thinks she's a woman, and Alex, a boy who dresses like one - hindered by mother-in-law Diana, who takes it on herself to move in to the family home. Also in the cast are Celia Imrie and Dani Harmer

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.

programme.title: Class Queers ()
programme.desc: An intimate documentary about three teenagers and the homophobia they have encountered in the educational system, revealing the impact it has had in the classroom and in their home lives

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton

programme.title: The Statue (1971)
programme.desc: A linguist's wife sculpts a nude statue of him to celebrate his achievements. However, when she grows weary of his neglect, she reveals that its impressive physique was modelled on another man. Convinced she has taken a lover, he sets out to identify the man behind the sculpture. Comedy, starring David Niven, Virna Lisi and Robert Vaughn

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Born Ready
programme.desc: After the death of Rebecca's father life has been very hard. Fed up of struggling Rebecca and her best friend make some risky decisions in a hope to change both of their current financial situations

programme.desc: Satirical comedy, starring Adrian Edmonson as Eddie Monsoon, a TV entertainer who following the failure of several pilot shows in his native South Africa faked his suicide and went to Brazil. He eventually arrives in England where he attracts notoriety with his explicit stage and media work, and later, while undergoing treatment of drug and alcohol addiction, agrees to sell an interview about his life and career

programme.desc: St Mirren v Celtic (Kick-off 8.00pm). The home side haven't beaten The Hoops in 17 meetings, a run stretching back to January 2013. Their last win came in a League Cup match which saw the hosts claim a 3-2 victory.
